meta.title: Emre Can Yalçın — Founder Strategy Consultant | eCyPro Consulting
meta.description: Emre Can Yalçın — eCyPro founder, strategy consultant bridging Turkey and the EU. 10+ years of experience, 120+ strategic decisions, Big4 methodology with boutique agility. Direct founder involvement on every engagement.

comparison.title: Big4 Consulting or Boutique?
comparison.subtitle: Why mid-market companies find the right partner in boutique firms like eCyPro.
comparison.footnote: Big4 methodology + boutique agility. Senior-level strategic decision support combined with on-the-ground execution discipline.

cards.title: Boutique Speed, Big4 Depth
cards.desc: We eliminate bureaucratic processes to deliver institutional-grade analytical quality in real time. Decisions are made quickly; implementation starts immediately.

cards.title: Turkey–EU Bridge
cards.desc: From Istanbul to London, we combine local market context and global standards under one roof. This bridge is the competitive advantage we deliver to every client.

cards.title: Commitment to Outcomes
cards.desc: Every engagement begins with a fixed price and measurable KPIs. Founder-level commitment on every project — a strategist in the field, not a junior analyst.
